name: Sketchy Marathon
short_description: Platform in a world that's drawn for you! A 2D endless platformer game where you must evade obstacles drawn by a rogue pencil! Explore a variety of biomes while improving your high score and collecting hats along the way.
detailed_description:
Sketchy Marathon is an arcade platformer following the journey of a stick figure trying to escape its creator. Explore the world of Sketchy Marathon and survive its many dangers as you make your way towards the next milestone.

   

  • Explore different biomes, each with their own dangers

  • Face a variety of challenge events, that force you to adapt to unique scenarios

  • Complete challenges and be rewarded with portals that boost your progress

  • Collect hearts to take a hit for you, because if you die, you're back to square one

  • Reach new milestones to unlock new looks for your character

  • Track your progress as you make your way through the world

  • Reach the final milestone to finally achieve happiness
